<!-- Template-Version: v0.1 -->
<!-- Replace <Room ID>, <Short name> in the title before submitting. -->

## Summary
Description of the background and purpose of the scene.

## Room
- **Room ID**: R-___
- **Location and mood**: e.g. dusk interior, warm key lights, cool shadows
- **Camera notes**: horizon, vanishing points, eye level

## Deliverables
- [ ] **PNG 320×200** at 1×, nearest neighbor, no smoothing
- [ ] Optional layered **PSD** or **Krita** file with clean layers, foreground
- [ ] **Masks** if applicable, walk-behind silhouettes on separate layer
- [ ] **Palette** consistent with project art bible, earthy lights, cool shadows

## Composition and style
- [ ] Clear silhouettes, readable at 1×
- [ ] Controlled dithering, no blur gradients
- [ ] Consistent light temperature compared to adjacent rooms
- [ ] Space for 9-verb UI at the bottom if applicable

## Integration notes
- **Walk-behinds**: list approximate baselines
- **Interactive props**: doors, levers, labels
- **Parallax layers**: if used, list speeds and depth intention

## References
Attach thumbnails or links to mood boards, previous FoY assets, or layout sketches.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Exports exactly 320×200 at 1×, nearest neighbor
- [ ] Passes style lead paint-over, minor fixes accepted
- [ ] Room designer confirms hotspot coverage and navigation sight lines
